name: Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle
short_description: Sugar Mess - Let's Play Jolly Battle is a fun arcade first-person shooter for the whole family. Shoot from a variety of weapons at hilarious opponents! Pass colorful levels with different mechanics and immerse yourself in a fascinating story!
detailed_description:
Sugar Mess – Let’s Play Jolly Battle is an award-winning VR first-person shooter for the whole family. Winner of Best XR/VR at Gamescom Latam Big Festival 2025, it takes you to the vibrant Sugar Kingdom, where you play as the Sugar Prince on a mission to save a cherished friendship.

Explore a Sweet Kingdom Full of Action

In Sugar Mess – Let’s Play Jolly Battle, you enter a world full of sweets, surprises, and shooting challenges. Whether it’s blasting through tricky foes or fighting mighty bosses, the shooter mechanics are designed to be fun, lighthearted, and non-violent, making it a great experience for families to enjoy together.

Experience Different Kinds of Shooting Levels

One moment you’ll be firing at waves of enemies; the next, you’re speeding along a mine cart rail, adding an extra burst of excitement and challenge to your shooting journey.

Get Creative with Various Weapons

What’s a hero without the right tools? You’ll have access to a range of weapons that help you take down the attacking cakes and bosses. Each one adds a bit of fun variety, letting you experiment and find the best fit for your style.

Take on Unforgettable Boss Battles

As you go deeper into the Sugar Kingdom, you’ll face powerful bosses, each with their own attack patterns and mechanics. These fights are where you’ll really get to test your skills and adapt your strategy.

Test Yourself in Nightmare Mode

Looking for something tougher? Nightmare Mode offers 10 extra hard levels designed for experienced players who want to push their abilities even further. It’s the perfect way to extend your adventure once you’ve mastered the main game.

Explore Puzzles, Rhythm Challenges, and More

Sugar Mess – Let’s Play Jolly Battle is not just about shooting. It mixes things up with puzzle levels, rhythm-based trials, and fun mini-games. It’s a colorful arcade blend where there's always something new to explore.

Collect Achievements and Complete Your Journey

As you play, you can unlock a variety of achievements that mark your progress. For those of you who love 100% completion, there’s plenty here to keep you coming back.

With its family-friendly approach, fun shooter mechanics, creative levels, and engaging challenges, Sugar Mess – Let’s Play Jolly Battle offers a VR experience that’s easy to pick up, fun to play, and hard to put down.

Grab your headset, jump in, and start your adventure today!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
